startMessage:
Hey! I'm the *IPU Ranklist Bot*, I can fetch results, datesheets and circulars from the [GGSIPU Website](http://ipu.ac.in/). My code is [open-source](https://github.com/ankushgarg1998/ipuranklist-bot), so you can also contribute to my development too. 

You can control me by the following commands:

/help - Gets you a descriptive list of all the commands.

*Fetch Commands*
/results - Fetches latest results on the website
/datesheets - Fetches latest datesheets on the website
/circulars - Fetches latest circulars on the website

*Subscribe Commands*
Use these commands to subscribe to a particular section of the website. So that whenever there's a new file uploaded on this section of the website. I'll notify you.
/subscriberesults - Get notified about new results
/subscribedatesheets - Get notified about new datesheets
/subscribecirculars - Get notified about new circulars

*Unsubscribe Commands*
Use these commands to unsubscribe from the updates.
/unsubscriberesults - Stop receiving result updates
/unsubscribedatesheets - Stop receiving datesheet updates
/unsubscribecirculars - Stop receiving circular updates

_But wait, you don't actually have to type these commands. See that *[/]* (slash box) at the bottom-right. Just press that and you can select any command._
